item.title: Markets Rally, But Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broader market rally and gains in small caps, Media Matrix Worldwide Ltd has slipped to its lowest price in 52 weeks, closing below key support levels on 28 Apr 2026. This decline contrasts sharply with the stock’s 10.21% return over the past year and the Sensex’s negative 4.15% performance, signalling stock-specific pressures at play. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Bimetal Bearings Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Mixed Financial Signals
item.description: A 1.53% decline today has dragged Bimetal Bearings Ltd to its lowest price in 52 weeks, closing at ₹570. This drop comes despite the stock trading above some short-term moving averages, highlighting a complex interplay of factors weighing on the micro-cap auto components player. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Mixed Performance Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a modest decline of 0.38% today, extending a recent five-day downward trend with a cumulative loss of 1.43%. This performance reflects a nuanced market environment where heavyweight stocks display divergent trajectories, and defensive sectors hold ground against cyclical pressures. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Vardhman Special Steels Ltd Reports Strong Quarterly Growth, Upgrades Financial Trend
item.description: Vardhman Special Steels Ltd has demonstrated a marked improvement in its financial performance for the quarter ending March 2026, signalling a positive shift in its growth trajectory. The company’s latest quarterly results reveal record-high net sales and profitability metrics, prompting an upgrade in its financial trend from flat to positive and a revision of its Mojo Grade from Sell to Hold. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Edges Lower Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends and Narrow Breadth
item.description: The mid-cap segment experienced a marginal decline on 28 Apr 2026, with the BSE MIDCAP 150 index slipping by 0.04%. Despite this subdued movement, several stocks within the segment upgraded their technical scores and ratings, signalling pockets of strength amid broader market caution. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Slip Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends; Small Caps Lead Gains
item.description: Indian equity markets closed lower on 28 Apr 2026, with the Sensex retreating 416.72 points (-0.54%) to 76,886.91 and the Nifty shedding 97 points (-0.40%) to end at 23,995.70. Despite the broader indices’ decline, select sectors and small caps demonstrated resilience, reflecting a nuanced market mood amid mixed domestic and global cues. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Edges Lower Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends and Weak Breadth
item.description: The BSE Smallcap 250 index marginally declined by 0.05% on 28 Apr 2026, reflecting a cautious market mood despite pockets of strong individual stock performances. While select small-cap stocks delivered robust returns, the overall segment grappled with weak breadth and sectoral disparities, signalling a nuanced outlook for investors navigating this volatile space. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Sky Gold & Diamonds Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 441
item.description: With a decisive break above Rs 441 on 28 Apr 2026, Sky Gold & Diamonds Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, extending its impressive rally that has delivered a 42.56% return over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum and sustained operational growth, setting the stage for a compelling price advance despite a broadly weaker market environment. Time: 54 minutes ago

item.title: Rossari Biotech Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 28 Apr 2026
item.description: Rossari Biotech Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 28 Apr 2026, touching a low of Rs 464.5, down 8.23% from previous levels. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting immediate selling pressure amid a cautious market environment. Time: 59 minutes ago

item.title: Federal-Mogul Goetze Rallies 7.02% and Approaches 200 DMA Resistance — A Key Technical Test Ahead
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.46% on 28 Apr 2026 while Federal-Mogul Goetze (India) Ltd surged 7.02%, outperforming its sector by nearly 6 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop, signalling a noteworthy shift in short-term momentum. Time: 59 minutes ago

item.title: Covance Softsol Leads Half-Year Rally with 159.6% Return Outperforming Benchmarks
item.description: Covance Softsol, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has delivered an exceptional 159.58% return over the past six months, significantly outperforming broader market indices and its sector peers. This remarkable surge is underpinned by a combination of strong financials, attractive valuation, and a mildly bullish technical outlook, positioning the stock as a compelling buy for investors seeking high-growth opportunities in the micro-cap space. Time: 59 minutes ago

item.title: Covance Softsol Leads Market Rally with Exceptional 2667% Return in One Year
item.description: Covance Softsol, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has delivered an extraordinary return of 2667.46% over the past year, vastly outperforming its peers and benchmark indices. This remarkable surge underscores the stock’s strong fundamentals, attractive valuation, and positive technical outlook, making it a standout performer in a challenging market environment. Time: 59 minutes ago

item.title: Spice Lounge Food Works Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Spice Lounge Food Works Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 28 Apr 2026, hitting a day low of Rs 22.57, down 9.97% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid heightened volatility and persistent selling pressure. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Adani Green Energy Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1258.5
item.description: With a 32.93% gain over the past year, Adani Green Energy Ltd has surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 1258.5 on 28 Apr 2026, outpacing the Sensex which declined by 4.19% during the same period. This milestone reflects a sustained rally fuelled by a confluence of positive technical indicators and robust price momentum despite a broadly weaker market backdrop. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Medico Intercontinental Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 23.85 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: Medico Intercontinental Ltd’s share price declined sharply to a new 52-week low of Rs.23.85 on 28 April 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s ongoing downward trajectory. The stock’s performance has been notably weak over the past year, reflecting a combination of deteriorating financial metrics and persistent market pressures. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. Hits New 52-Week High of Rs 355.9 on Back of Strong Technical Signals
item.description: Surging past its previous peak, Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. (BHEL) touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 355.9 on 28 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 53.87% gain over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of robust technical momentum and sustained price strength, even as the broader Sensex index trades lower. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 2915
item.description: Surging past the Rs 2915 mark on 28 Apr 2026, Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, extending its remarkable rally that has delivered a 134.87% return over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum and sustained upward price action, even as the broader Sensex index trades lower. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 2,910.40 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd (MCX) has reached a significant milestone by touching an all-time high price on 28 April 2026, reflecting its sustained strong performance and market confidence. The stock closed at Rs 2,910.40, marking a remarkable achievement in its trading history. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: AGI Greenpac Q4 FY26: Strong Profit Surge Masks Margin Concerns
item.description: AGI Greenpac Ltd., the second-largest company in India's packaging sector, reported a robust 61.48% quarter-on-quarter surge in net profit to ₹115.38 crores for Q4 FY26, marking the highest quarterly profit in the company's recent history. The strong bottom-line performance, which also represented a 19.43% year-on-year improvement, triggered a dramatic market reaction with the stock surging 19.28% to ₹673.40 following the results announcement. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: International Travel House Q4 FY26: Margins Compress as Travel Demand Softens
item.description: International Travel House Ltd., the ITC Group-owned travel management company, reported a challenging fourth quarter for FY26, with net profit declining 31.45% year-on-year to ₹5.23 crores from ₹7.63 crores in Q4 FY25. The ₹266.06 crore market capitalisation company witnessed its stock tumble 3.33% to ₹332.80 following the results announcement, reflecting investor concerns over deteriorating profitability metrics despite stable revenue performance. Time: 1 hour ago
